summary: Executed backend + frontend regression for project werkbon multi-day flow, project PDF send endpoint, app-settings/theme exposure, admin settings UI, and standard nieuwe werkbon shell on public preview URL.

ui_bugs.issue: At mobile viewport (375x667), admin panel sidebar/content does not adapt and settings heading text collapses vertically/clips, reducing usability.

issues: No mobile-responsive breakpoint for desktop sidebar layout in web admin panel.

react_native_issues.issue: Console still reports deprecated style warning: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.'

action_items: Add responsive behavior or explicit desktop-only guard/message for admin web panel when opened on small/mobile viewport.
Continue migrating deprecated shadow* web styles to boxShadow to reduce console noise.
Align frontend env naming with strict project guidance (EXPO_BACKEND_URL convention) across screens/contexts.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/app/admin/instellingen.tsx interactive controls still lack testID attributes, reducing deterministic E2E coverage stability.
Multiple frontend files (e.g., login/theme/project/admin settings) still rely on EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL and fallback chains; project guidance requests stricter env-key consistency.
backend/server.py still includes fallback defaults for APP_URL and DB_NAME instead of fully fail-fast env-only usage.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all requested flows passed; 1 responsive design issue on admin settings in mobile viewport)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned TEST_ProjectKlant_* and TEST_ProjectWerf_* plus temporary project werkbon records during pytest run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: NO MOCKED API USED. Public preview URL used. Worker login (davy@smart-techbv.be) and admin login (hr@smart-techbv.be) succeeded. Project werkbon screen rendered multi-day add button, feedback checklist, 3-star score and signature block; add-day increased row count from 1 to 2. /api/app-settings and /api/instellingen exposed expected theme/text fields.
rca_of_issue: Admin panel uses persistent desktop sidebar layout with no small-screen adaptation; when tested in required mobile viewport, available width is consumed by sidebar and causes settings heading/content clipping.
